yudisiumTranscripts.title: Transcripts & Judicium
yudisiumTranscripts.subtitle: Print students' final professional grade summaries.
yudisiumTranscripts.listDescription: Select a student to view and print their grade transcript.

yudisiumTranscriptDetail.notFound: Transcript not found or you do not have access.
yudisiumTranscriptDetail.address: Jl. Pendidikan Dokter No. 1, Jakarta 12345, Indonesia
yudisiumTranscriptDetail.signatureRole: Head of the Doctor Professional Program

yudisiumEligibility.title: Judicium Eligibility
yudisiumEligibility.subtitle: Automatic validation of graduation requirements for all students in a cohort before the judicium session.
yudisiumEligibility.requirementsDesc: Requirements checked: all mandatory rotations passed · all logbooks verified · competency targets met · minimum clinical assessments · attendance with no outstanding records.
yudisiumEligibility.emptyCohort: This cohort has no students yet.

yudisiumDocuments.title: Official Documents
yudisiumDocuments.subtitle: QR-coded official transcripts whose authenticity can be verified publicly.
yudisiumDocuments.eligibilityDesc: Graduation requirements are checked automatically from real system data (grades, logbook, competency, assessments, attendance).
yudisiumDocuments.verifyDesc: Every PDF contains a unique QR code. Anyone (hospitals, other institutions) can scan it to confirm the document is authentic and issued by the ACMS FK UMS system — without logging in.
yudisiumDocuments.emptyDesc: Click “Create Official Transcript” — the document is processed in the background (±1 minute).
